message.buildingwand.supply.range_ready: [Supply] Region selected | Right-click a worksite post to link
message.buildingwand.supply.need_post: Right-click a worksite post to finish linking.
message.buildingwand.supply.no_container: No containers (chests/barrels/shulker boxes) in the selection.
message.buildingwand.supply.linked: Linked %s containers to the worksite! Materials are pulled automatically while building.
message.buildingwand.supply.none_linked: This worksite has no linked chests yet. Use Supply Link mode to select a chest region and right-click the post.
message.buildingwand.worksite.withdraw_s: Select a material in the list to withdraw.
message.buildingwand.smart.failed: Smart selection failed: target must be a contiguous structure.
message.buildingwand.smart.locked: [Smart Selection] Locked range %s -> %s | Right-click again to confirm
message.buildingwand.fill.no_material: Put the fill block in your offhand or hotbar.
message.buildingwand.fill.no_air: There are no air blocks to fill in this area.
message.buildingwand.replace.smart_ready: [Smart Selection] Range locked | Right-click the block to replace
message.buildingwand.replace.range_ready: [Replace] Range selected | Third right-click chooses the block to replace
message.buildingwand.replace.no_air_targ: You cannot choose air as the replacement target.
message.buildingwand.replace.no_material: Put the replacement block in your offhand or hotbar.
message.buildingwand.replace.empty: There are no matching target blocks in this area.
message.buildingwand.replace.smart_empty: There are no matching target blocks in the smart selection.
message.buildingwand.move.immovable: The selected region contains immovable blocks.
message.buildingwand.move.source_immovab: The source region contains immovable blocks.
message.buildingwand.move.smart_copied: [Smart Selection] Recorded %s blocks | Right-click=move | R=rotate | B=flip
message.buildingwand.copy.smart_copied: [Smart Selection] Copied %s blocks | Right-click=paste | R=rotate | B=flip
message.buildingwand.paste.no_blocks: There are no blocks to place here.
message.buildingwand.paste.auto_worksite: Not enough materials. Created a worksite instead.
message.buildingwand.worksite.post_block: The worksite post must go above the selected block, but that space is not air.
message.buildingwand.worksite.created: Worksite created! Right-click the post to manage materials and construction.
message.buildingwand.worksite.replace_ho: Hold the block you want to replace with.
message.buildingwand.worksite.replace_lo: You cannot replace materials after construction has started.
message.buildingwand.worksite.replace_fa: Replacement failed. Select a material in the worksite list first.
message.buildingwand.worksite.missing_da: Worksite data is missing. Break this post and place a new one.
message.buildingwand.schematic.loaded: Schematic loaded: %s blocks. Right-click to create a worksite.
message.buildingwand.client.loaded: Schematic loaded successfully! Total %s blocks. Right-click the ground to place a worksite.
message.buildingwand.export.empty: Nothing to export. Copy a structure first (Copy mode, then right-click two corners).
message.buildingwand.export.path: Saved to: %s  -- share this .litematic file with friends!
message.buildingwand.export.failed: Export failed: a schematic named "%s" may already exist. Try another name.
tooltip.buildingwand.fill.hint: Put a fill block in your offhand or hotbar, then right-click two corners.
tooltip.buildingwand.schematic: [Schematic Mode] Right-click a position to create a worksite
tooltip.buildingwand.replace.hint: Right-click two corners, then right-click the block type to replace.
tooltip.buildingwand.move.hint: Right-click two corners, then right-click the target position to move.
tooltip.buildingwand.supply.hint: Right-click two corners, then right-click a worksite post to feed its chests into the build.
screen.buildingwand.settings.title: Building Wand Settings
screen.buildingwand.settings.scan_hint: Scan = maximum connected blocks to inspect
screen.buildingwand.settings.block_hint: Blocks = maximum final selected blocks allowed
screen.buildingwand.worksite.title: Worksite Control
